raw_consumer_statement:
Went to XXXX XXXX and ordered product. Product was {$110.00} total. XXXX XXXX  made duplicate charge for same day - XX/XX/2024 and for same amount and submitted charges to Credit card. This is a duplicate charge from XXXX  XXXX company. Contacted credit card and submitted dispute. Credit card obtained documentation from XXXX  XXXX which shows 1 invoice, 1 charge for {$110.00} on XX/XX/2024. XXXX  XXXX did not submit any documentation for 2 charges of {$110.00} each. 
Credit card statement of XX/XX/2024 shows 2 duplicate charges. 

Credit card will not reverse the 2nd charge of {$110.00}. Credit card is Citi Bank Costco Anywhere credit card. Citi Bank  card needs to reverse this charge as they received information from XXXX  XXXX. Citi Bank mishandled this situation and needs to fix it immediately.
